entries.d: to travel somewhere by plane
entries.s: We are going to _____ sunny Spain this summer by aeroplane from Vienna airport.

entries.d: to try to catch fish
entries.s: Dad and I want to _____ at the river with our rods and buckets tomorrow to catch some trout.

entries.d: to sleep at a place for tents
entries.s: We are going to _____ in our family tent right next to the lake for the whole summer holiday.
mc: to stay at a luxury hotel

entries.d: to go swimming in the ocean
entries.s: I love to _____ in the salty blue water on sunny days when we are on holiday at the beach.
mc: to swim in the school pool

entries.d: to play a game with a net and a shuttlecock
entries.s: Let's _____ with our rackets and a light shuttlecock in the garden this afternoon.

entries.d: to rest outside when it is sunny
entries.s: Mum likes to _____ on a beach towel and read a book on holiday to get a nice suntan.

entries.d: to send a card with a picture from your holiday
entries.s: I always _____ with a short holiday message and a picture to send to my grandma in the mail.

entries.d: to play games like Monopoly on a table
entries.s: When it rains heavily outside, we _____ together like Monopoly and Scrabble as a family on the table.

entries.d: to go and see an old big building
entries.s: On our summer trip to the mountains, we are going to _____ with tall stone walls, towers, and old knights' armour.

entries.d: the sister of your mum or dad
entries.s: My _____ Jane — my mum's sister — always gives me nice presents for my birthday every year.

entries.d: a sandy place next to the sea
entries.s: We built a tall sandcastle with a moat on the sandy _____ near the blue sea on holiday.

entries.d: a game you play on a table with pieces
entries.s: My favourite _____ that you play on a square board with dice is Monopoly. Four players can play.

entries.d: a place where people sleep in tents
entries.s: There were many colourful tents and campervans at the _____ near the lake where we stayed for a week.

entries.d: a person who makes food
entries.s: My grandpa is the best _____ in our whole family. He makes delicious pasta in the kitchen.

entries.d: to go somewhere in a car
entries.s: My dad will _____ us to the airport tomorrow morning in our car so we can catch our plane.

entries.d: a time when you do not go to school
entries.s: Where are you going for your long summer _____ this year when school is closed for two months?

entries.d: a big area of nature that is protected
entries.s: We saw big brown bears and beautiful wild deer in the protected _____ where animals live freely.

entries.d: your mother and father
entries.s: My _____ — my mum and dad — are taking me on a trip to Italy this summer by plane.

entries.d: a big machine that flies in the sky
entries.s: The _____ with wings and two jet engines left the airport at nine in the morning and flew up into the sky.

entries.d: the warm time of year between spring and autumn
entries.s: In _____, the hot months of June, July, and August, the days are long and we play outside a lot.

entries.d: a very big animal that lives in rivers in Africa
entries.s: We saw a big grey _____ — short for hippopotamus — cooling down in the water at the zoo.

entries.d: to become part of a group
entries.s: Would you like to _____ our football team? We need one more player for the match on Saturday.

entries.d: to ask someone to come to a party or event
entries.s: I want to _____ all my best friends to come to my birthday party at my house on Saturday.
